rules.description: Printer is required
Printer quantity is required
Quantities greater than zero
Package is required
Product not stocked

At least one product is required.
Duplicate products
Equipment inactive
Gas inactive
Fee inactive
The nursing card name must be unique.
The ward is required
The service date is required
The practitioner is required
The rich ward service date must not be less than admission date
The rich ward service date must not be less than departure date
The rich ward service date must be less than today
The rich ward gas times must not overlap
The rich ward gas start time must not be greater than end time
The rich ward gas start time must not be same as end time
The rich ward gas total minutes must not be greater than a day
The rich ward gas uses must not be greater than a day
The rich ward gas total must not be greater than a day

Quantities for standard product greater than zero
The rich ward service date difference must not be greater than seven days
The rich ward equipment already billed
The rich ward fees already billed
The rich ward gas times overlap with previous billed time
The rich ward gas times total with previous billed time is greater than a day
The rich ward gas times must not be in future
Accident and Emergency Fee is required
Admission in unsupported state by ward
The rich ward gas times must not be less than admission
Gets raised when an event is added on or after the departure date
Gets raised when an event is added on or before the admission date
Gets raised when two events have the same start date time
Gets raised when the admission date changes
Gets raised when a departure event has been added
Gets raised when the current bed is occupied
Gets raised when the current bed is blocked
Gets raised when the current bed is disabled
Gets raised when the current ward is disabled
Gets raised when the second event is not a of type bed event
Gets raised when there is more than one admission event
Gets raised when there is more than one departure event
Gets raised if there is a departure event and it is not the last even
Gets raised when the usage reason has not been supplied
Gets raised when the event type has not been supplied
Gets raised when the event start date is in the future
Gets raised when the event start date has not been supplied
Gets raised when the event start time has not been supplied
Gets raised when the ward has not been supplied
Gets raised when the ward has not been supplied
Gets raised when the room has not been supplied
Gets raised when the bed has not been supplied
Gets raised when the level of care has not been supplied
Gets raised when the facility has not been supplied
Gets raised when the admission date is before date of birth
Gets raised when the baby's admission date is before mother's admission date
Gets raised when the current visit is not a linked baby visit

validations.summary: /// Determines whether the specified dependency object is valid. ///
/// Execute the evaluations one by one and build up the list of failures. /// A list of business rule failure. ///

validations.conditions: we.WardEventVersionId != wardEvent.CurrentVersion.WardEventVersionId | n.ServiceDate == wardEvent.CurrentVersion.ServiceDate && n.CalculatedStartTime < cn.EndTime && n.CalculatedEndTime > cn.StartTime | isOverlapping

nonConsumable.IsDirty | !nonConsumable.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory.Equals(NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.AccidentEmergencyGas | TotalMinutes > MAX_MINUTES | n.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory == NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.WardGas && n.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription == MINUTES_DESCRIPTION | n.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory == NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.WardGas && n.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription == QUANTITY_DESCRIPTION | totalMinutes > MAX_MINUTES | isOverlapping

n.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory == NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.WardGas && n.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription == MINUTES_DESCRIPTION | n.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory == NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.WardGas && n.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription == QUANTITY_DESCRIPTION | totalMinutes > MAX_MINUTES

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified context. ///

validations.conditions: wardEventContext.WardEvent.ServiceDate <= DateTime.MinValue | tagsFound.Any( | tagsFound.Any( | tagsFound.ToList( | wardEventContext.WardEvent.ServiceDate.Date > DateTime.Today.Date | wardEventContext.WardEvent.Practitioner == null | wardEventContext.WardEvent.Ward == null

validations.summary: /// Validates the context. ///
/// Changes to restrict user to change the Baby's admission date before mothers admission date. ///
/// Validates the that the DOB is Not later than admission date. ///
/// Validates the that the usage reason has been supplied. ///
/// Validates the that there is only one admission event. ///
/// Validates the that there is only one departure event. ///
/// Validates the that the admission date has not been edited. ///
/// Validates the that the second event is A bed event. ///
validations.conditions: admission != null | visitTypeAccommodationRule != null && visitTypeAccommodationRule.MustHaveBeds | context.AccommodationEvents.Count > 1 && context.AccommodationEvents[1].AccommodationEventType != AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Bed && context.AccommodationEvents[1].AccommodationEventType != AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Ward

validations.summary: /// Validates the that A discharge event has not been added. ///
/// Validates the that the current bed is not occupied. ///
validations.conditions: context.AccommodationEvents.Count > 1 | !context.DepartDate.HasValue || (departureEvent == null | lastBedAccommodationEvent != null | medicalEventUtilisation != null && medicalEventUtilisation.MedicalEventId != context.MedicalEventId

validations.summary: /// Validates the that the current bed is not blocked. ///
/// Validates the that the current bed or ward is enabled. ///
/// Validates the that the departure event is the last event. ///
validations.conditions: lastEvent != null && lastEvent.AccommodationEventType != AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Discharged && lastEvent.AccommodationEventType != AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Deceased && lastEvent.AccommodationEventType != AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.DischargeLinkedBabyVisit

validations.summary: /// Validates the specified bed event. ///
/// Validates if the ward has been supplied. ///
/// Validates if the room has been supplied. ///
/// Validates if the bed has been supplied. ///
/// Validates the specified accommodation event. ///
/// Validates if the event type has been supplied. ///
/// Validates if the event start date is in the future. ///
/// Validates if the event start date has been supplied. ///
/// Validates if the event start date is after admission date and before departure date. ///
validations.conditions: admissionEvent != null | accommodationEventStartDate <= admissionEventStartDate && accommodationEvent.AccommodationEventType != AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Admitted | departureEvent != null

validations.summary: /// Validates that departure date is not between other event startdate. ///
validations.conditions: accommodationEvent.AccommodationEventType == AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Discharged || accommodationEvent.AccommodationEventType == AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.Deceased || accommodationEvent.AccommodationEventType == AccommodationEventTypeCodeData.DischargeLinkedBabyVisit | accommodationEvent.Identifier != e.Identifier && accommodationEvent.StartDate < e.StartDate

validations.summary: /// Validates the there are no other events with the same start date. ///
/// Validates the specified facility event. ///
/// Validates if the facility has been supplied. ///
/// Validates the specified ward event. ///
/// Validates if the ward has been supplied. ///
